message:
feat: config API endpoint with model dropdown in UI

- GET /api/config returns available models from GAUNTLET_MODELS (comma-
  separated) or GAUNTLET_AGENT_MODEL env vars
- NewRunModal shows dropdown when models are configured, text input
  as fallback
- Warning shown when no model is configured (both server log and UI)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
